title: Claude Code + Obsidian: Build an AI Second Brain That Actually Works
whyTrending: Karpathy's LLM Knowledge Base gist got 14K+ stars in April 2026. Obsidian has 1.5M monthly users. MCP bridges, Claudian plugin, and Kepano building official Claude Skills for Obsidian. The hottest Claude Code integration right now.

title: Claude Code + Notion: Automate Your Entire Product Workflow
whyTrending: Official Notion MCP server + Claude Code plugin from makenotion. Search workspace, create pages, manage databases, add content — all from CLI. Product managers are adopting it to auto-generate tickets from PRDs.

title: Claude Code + Jira/Linear: Issue-Driven Development Without Leaving the Terminal
whyTrending: Jira and Linear MCP servers let Claude read tickets, implement fixes, and update status without context switching. 'Implement fix for ENG-4521' → Claude reads ticket, writes code, commits. End-to-end issue-driven dev.

title: The Developer's MCP Stack: Obsidian + GitHub + Sentry + Postgres + Slack in One Workflow
whyTrending: 400+ MCP servers exist but nobody shows how to combine them into a cohesive workflow. The real power is chaining: Slack alert → Sentry error → GitHub PR → Obsidian knowledge base. Practical multi-MCP orchestration.

title: Context7 MCP: How to Give Claude Code Always-Fresh Documentation
whyTrending: Context7 by Upstash delivers version-specific library docs directly into Claude Code. Instead of relying on stale training data, Claude gets the exact docs for your version of React/Next.js/Prisma. Game changer for accuracy.

title: Building a Personal AI Knowledge Base: Claude Code + Obsidian + RAG Pipeline
whyTrending: Beyond simple note access — building a full RAG pipeline over your Obsidian vault with local embeddings (Smart Connections), semantic search, and Claude Code as the query interface. Your notes become a searchable AI brain.

title: Claude Code for Product Managers: From PRD to Deployed Feature Without Writing Code
whyTrending: PMs connecting Claude Code to Notion (PRDs), Linear (tickets), Figma (designs), and GitHub (implementation). The non-engineer AI workflow — write a PRD, let Claude Code implement it end-to-end.

title: Obsidian as a Developer's Second Brain: The Complete 2026 Setup with AI
whyTrending: Obsidian crossed 1.5M users with 22% YoY growth. Smart Connections (local embeddings), Copilot (100K+ users), Khoj AI, and now Claude Code MCP. The developer PKM stack is maturing fast.

title: Slack + Claude Code: Build AI-Powered Team Notifications and Incident Response
whyTrending: Slack MCP server lets Claude post to channels, read threads, and respond to alerts. Combined with Sentry MCP for error tracking — automated incident triage that posts findings to your team's #incidents channel.

title: The AI-Powered Zettelkasten: Combining Obsidian's Linking with Claude's Reasoning
whyTrending: Zettelkasten methodology + AI = automatic link suggestions, concept extraction, and knowledge graph building. Claude reads your notes and suggests connections you'd never make manually. PKM meets LLM.
